channel.title: Live Response to Remotely Collect Defender Logs :: Novian Andrian
channel.description: When you are troubleshooting Defender in an endpoint, most of the time you will need the logs, and collecting locally is a painful task. Fortunately you could use MDE - Live Response function to run the MDE Client Analyzer (MDECA) script remotely, and download it from your Defender portal console. As long as the endpoint is online and connecting properly to MDE, you can use this method. This guide will help you with the following scenarios:
